creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
After a huge of updates the alst two days and a triggered update of ports on our server- and workstation infrastructure, we ran into serious problems upgrading boxes with 'portmaser'. x11/gnome-libs doesn't build anymore and I found no way  solving the problem. Obviously this error occured after the png-port has been updated (an observation I made on other boxes). The error is below.

Installing the binary port with pkg_add -r ends up with unavailable fiel:

Error: Unable to get ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-8-stable/Latest/x11/gnome-libs.tbz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)

---

cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/glib12 -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/gtk12 -I/usr/local/include/glib12 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused  -c convertrgb.c
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/glib12 -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/gtk12 -I/usr/local/include/glib12 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused  -c loadpng.c
loadpng.c: In function 'g_LoadPNG':
loadpng.c:32: warning: 'jmpbuf' is deprecated (declared at /usr/local/include/png.h:1090)
loadpng.c:38: warning: 'color_type' is deprecated (declared at /usr/local/include/png.h:647)
loadpng.c: In function 'gispng':
loadpng.c:164: warning: implicit declaration of function 'png_check_sig'
/bin/sh ../../libtool --mode=link cc  -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused   -o convertrgb  convertrgb.o loadpng.o -lXpm -ljpeg -lpng -lz -lz -lSM -lICE -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -lgtk-12 -lgdk-12 -lgmodule-12 -lglib-12 -lintl -lXi -lXext -lX11 -lm -L/usr/local/lib -lglib-12 -lz -lm -L/usr/local/lib
mkdir .libs
cc -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused -o convertrgb convertrgb.o loadpng.o  /usr/local/lib/libXpm.so /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so -lpng -lz -lz /usr/local/lib/libSM.so /usr/local/lib/libICE.so -L/usr/local/lib -lgtk-12 -lgdk-12 -lgmodule-12 -lglib-12 /usr/local/lib/libintl.so /usr/local/lib/libXi.so /usr/local/lib/libXext.so /usr/local/lib/libX11.so -lm -lglib-12 -lz -lm -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
loadpng.o(.text+0x40): In function `gispng':
: undefined reference to `png_check_sig'
gmake[3]: *** [convertrgb] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/gnome-libs/work/gnome-libs-1.4.2/tools/convertrgb'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/gnome-libs/work/gnome-libs-1.4.2/tools'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/gnome-libs/work/gnome-libs-1.4.2'
gmake: *** [all-recursive-am] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/gnome-libs.

===>>> make failed for x11/gnome-libs
===>>> Aborting update
